content: Phase 2.1: Map existing /closet/save flow, find current rembg + reconstruction call sites
Phase 2.2: Add background rembg task at /save time for one-pass items (populates clean_image_url when done)
Phase 2.3: New endpoint POST /api/v1/closet/{id}/reconstruct — already exists as /closet/{id}/repair
Phase 2.4: Surface clean_image_url + clean_image_status on GET /closet/{id} (auto via Pydantic model)
Phase 2.5: Lint, restart, smoke test the new endpoints against CCP image
Phase 2 review checkpoint with user before Phase 3
